attributes.action: Stop - Failed asylum seeker families to be offered up to £40k to leave UK
attributes.additional_details: Current rules are being bypassed when people travel through safe countries before reaching the UK. This undermines the integrity of the asylum system, misuses public funds, and weakens enforcement of immigration law. Ensuring compliance protects resources and upholds the rule of law.
attributes.background: Stop funding failed asylum claims. Enforce the law: return anyone who traveled through safe countries to the last safe country they came from. No one is above immigration rules. Uphold UK asylum system integrity.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
